history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian male, styled in a streetwear fashion, stands with his arms crossed, looking to his right. He wears a black hoodie with pink flame graphics and a white interior, paired with baggy black pants featuring grey paneling and decorative star and cross motifs. On his head, he sports a black baseball cap with pink mesh and the number "72" embroidered in white. His footwear consists of light brown work boots.

The background is an indoor setting with a distinct urban, skate-culture vibe. To the left, a white skateboard is mounted vertically on the wall, adorned with a graphic of two figures in a classical painting style at the top and a black and white image of a wolf or similar animal below, accompanied by text. To the right, another skateboard is also displayed vertically, featuring a vibrant graphic of Mickey Mouse characters in a colorful, playful design.

In the mid-ground, a white counter with a tiled backsplash supports a turntable with headphones. Beyond the counter, an opening reveals a dining area with tables and chairs, and a wall with a grid-like pattern of wooden panels. A framed picture hangs on a pillar between the two skateboards.

The lighting is warm and diffused, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the wooden floor and the various objects in the scene. The overall color palette is a mix of dark tones from the clothing and skateboards, contrasted with the warm wood and the bright accents of the graphics. The mood is casual, cool, and youthful, evoking a sense of urban art and skateboarding lifestyle. The composition is a medium shot, focusing on the subject and his immediate surroundings, with a slight depth of field that blurs the background.
